title: AWS Static Site Cloud Lab
description: A beginner-friendly cloud infrastructure project focused on deploying a static website using AWS. The project demonstrates static website hosting, cloud storage, deployment documentation, and the basics of making a site publicly accessible through cloud services.

title: DevOps Health API
description: A DevOps-focused API project built to practice health checks, Docker containerization, and deployment automation. The project demonstrates how an application can be prepared for testing, monitoring, and reliable release through a CI/CD workflow.
